name: Gluehwein (Hot Spiced Wine)
recipeIngredient: 1/4 liter White or red wine (1 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the wine into a pre-warmed glass.
2. Add the lemon peel, cinnamon stick, and sugar cubes (or desired amount of sweetener).
3. Remove the spices before serving by straining them through a cheesecloth bag.
4. Serve immediately in the pre-warmed glass.
